data.title: VivoPower announces leadership changes; global developer and owner of powered land and data center infrastructure, Nasdaq: VVPR.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, VivoPower International PLC (Nasdaq: VVPR) disclosed adjustments to its executive leadership team. VivoPower, a prominent B Corp-certified company focusing on powered land and data center infrastructure for AI compute applications, made this announcement.

data.title: Calavo Growers to reveal First Quarter 2026 earnings on March 12; Nasdaq-GS: CVGW, global in fresh produce.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Santa Paula, California, Calavo Growers, Inc., a prominent player in the global market for avocados, tomatoes, papayas, and guacamole, stated its intention to disclose financial outcomes for the fiscal Q1 concluded on January 31, 2026. The organization, trading as Nasdaq-GS: CVGW, is set to unveil these figures and submit its Form 10-Q post-market closure on March 12, 2026.

data.title: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. in Calgary, Alberta reports strong reserves additions in 2025, with evaluation covering 100% of reserves.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 19, 2026, Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) shared its latest independent reserves report as of December 31, 2025. The assessment, carried out by GLJ Ltd., covered 100% of Peyto's reserves, marking the Company's 27th year of effective reserves development. The financial and operational data disclosed in this announcement relies on estimated unaudited financial results for the year ending on December 31, 2025. Find more details under "Unaudited Financial Information" in the Advisories section of this release.

data.title: Goodfellow Inc. (TSX: GDL) reports Q4 & FY results ending Nov 30, 2025, declares dividend.
data.description: In Delson, Quebec on February 19, 2026, Goodfellow Inc. (TSX: GDL) disclosed its latest financial performance.

data.title: Superior Plus Corp. reports Q4 2025 results, aiming to enhance North American propane business with key operational upgrades.
data.description: Superior Plus Corp. unveiled its Q4 and full-year earnings for the period concluding on December 31, 2025. The company's President and CEO, Allan MacDonald, expressed the company's vigorous efforts in revamping their North American propane sector at the onset of 2025. Enhancements in operational efficiency and productivity were noted. Superior reported significant advancements and key takeaways from the past year. The company's shares (TSX: SPB) showcased positive growth amidst their strategic initiatives.

data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. appoints Francis Trudeau as Executive VP Finance; to become CFO on May 19, 2026. Éric Gemme retiring on June 19, 2026.
data.description: In Rougemont, Quebec, on February 19, 2026, Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) revealed the selection of Francis Trudeau as the new Executive Vice-President Finance, effective March 16, 2026. This decision is part of a planned leadership shift that will see Mr. Trudeau taking on the role of Chief Financial Officer on May 19, 2026. He will be taking over from Éric Gemme, who is set to retire from Lassonde on June 19, 2026. It has been disclosed earlier that Mr. Gemme will be actively involved in the transition process to assist Mr. Trudeau smoothly integrate into his new position.

data.title: Boardwalk REIT's strong performance in 2025 with increased distribution by 11.1%, FFO per Unit of $1.20 for Q4 2025, NOI of $108.5 million, Same Property NOI of $102.5 million, and occupancy at 97.6% in Q4 2025. Introduction of 2026 guidance with FFO range of $4.65 to $4.90 per Unit. Completed dispositions and acquisitions for a net gain, affirming financial health and growth opportunities.
data.description: Boardwalk Real Estate Investment Trust reported strong financial performance for the three and twelve-month periods ending December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, Funds From Operations (FFO) was $1.20 per unit, a 11.1% increase from Q4 2024, with a Net Operating Income (NOI) of $108.5 million and Same Property NOI of $102.5 million. For the twelve months ending December 31, 2025, FFO per unit was $4.65, reflecting an 11.2% increase from the previous year. The Trust achieved a Profit of $196.9 million during this period.Noteworthy figures for Q4 2025 include a 4.5% increase in same property rental revenue from a year ago, an occupancy rate of 97.6%, and an average occupied rent of $1,590. The Trust completed dispositions of non-core communities, totaling 1,382 suites with gross proceeds of $277.6 million and acquisitions of newer communities totaling 1,376 suites for $551.5 million in 2025. Boardwalk REIT also introduced its 2026 financial guidance and increased its regular monthly distribution to $1.80 per trust unit on an annualized basis.The Trust's strong and flexible balance sheet indicates approximately $466.0 million in total available liquidity at the end of the quarter, with 96% of mortgages carrying CMHC-insurance. Despite a loss of $50.8 million for the year ended December 31, 2025, the Trust's Debt to EBITDA ratio improved from 10.08x in 2024 to 9.99x in 2025, with Debt to Total Assets at 42.3% compared to 40.6% in 2024. Boardwalk REIT is optimistic about 2026, focusing on disciplined cash flow compounding for Unitholders and enhancing its operational efficiency and decision-making processes through new technologies.

data.title: Dow drops amid U.S.-Iran tensions, Warren Buffett's Berkshire holding rises; Carvana stock plunges on earnings.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to ongoing tensions between the U.S. and Iran regarding the nuclear situation. Carvana stock took a significant hit following their earnings report. On the other hand, Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway holdings saw a substantial increase. The market continues to react to the uncertainties caused by the U.S.-Iran standoff, with investors closely monitoring the situation. Overall, the stock market experienced fluctuations with the Dow Jones dropping, Carvana stock plunging, and Berkshire Hathaway holdings soaring amid the geopolitical concerns.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile will give a quarterly business update on March 2, 2026 at 5:00 pm (Eastern Time), including Q&A with shareholders.
data.description: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. revealed plans to host a quarterly business update conference call on Monday, March 2nd at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). The company, traded as NASDAQ: ASTS, is developing the initial space-based cellular broadband network accessible by regular smartphones. This network is intended for commercial and government use. During the call, AST SpaceMobile will answer inquiries from both retail and institutional shareholders along with management.
